proof: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T1](lib(functions).identity_fn[T1], x0, x1) = x0(x1) }[Bool, Bool -> Bool]((and), is_continuous[Y, X](g) and is_continuous[X, Y](f))
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T1](lib(functions).identity_fn[T1], x0, x1) = x0(x1) }[Bool, Bool -> Bool]((and), is_continuous[Y, X](g))

function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0) { (is_continuous[T0, T1](x0) and is_continuous[T1, T0](x1) and forall(x2: T0) { x1(x0(x2)) = x2 } and forall(x3: T1) { x0(x1(x3)) = x3 }) = is_homeomorphism[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[X, Y](f, g)
function(x0: Bool, x1: Bool) { (x0 and x1) = (x1 and x0) }(is_continuous[Y, X](g) and is_continuous[X, Y](f) and forall(x2: Y) { f(g(x2)) = x2 }, forall(x3: X) { g(f(x3)) = x3 })
function(x0: Bool) { (x0 and x0) = x0 }(is_continuous[X, Y](f))
function(x0: Bool) { (true and x0) = x0 }(forall(x1: Y) { f(g(x1)) = x1 })
function(x0: Bool) { (true and x0) = x0 }(forall(x1: X) { g(f(x1)) = x1 })
